titleStmt.title: SII 18.197: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 197. (B.K. No. 159 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 4th year of the reign of Bhillamadēva, Saumya, Kārtika śu. Pūrṇimā, Monday, Saṁkramaṇa, Bharaṇī. In the cyclic year Saumya, corresponding to A.D. 1189, the details do not work out correctly. In the next year Sādhāraṇa, however, the details correspond regularly to A.D. 1190, October 15, Monday. On that day the nakshatra was Bharaṇī but there was no Saṁkramaṇa. This is probably the intended date.

It registers a grant of land and house-site made by Vaijarasa-Daṇḍanāyaka, an officer under Mahāpradhāna Prachaṇḍa-daṇḍanāyaka Vayidēvarasa, for repairs to the temple of Boppēśvara of Taṁba. The gift was entrusted to Chandarāsi and Śāntarā�i the ācharyās of that temple Vaijarasa-Daṇḍanayāka is stated to be governing the six towns (bāḍa of Taṁba.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgassiraścuṁbicaṁ
dracāmaracāravē trailōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁ
bhavē(ṁ) . svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāya
ṇaṁ viṣṇuvaṁśōdubhavaṁ dvārā
vatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ māḻavimalla
hiyasella gūrjjaravāraṇāṁ
kusaṁ pratāpalaṁkēsvaraṁ kaṁnaḍa
rāyasaṁhāraṁ śrīmatu
pratāpacakravartti bhillamadēvava
rṣada nālkeneya saumyasaṁvatsarada
kārttika suddha puṁṇnami sōma
vāra vitīpāta saṁkramā
ṇa bharaṇīnakṣatradaṁdu tatupādō
pajīvitaṁ © svasti samastapra
sastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāpradhā
naṁ sēnādhipati bāhattaraniyōgādhi
pati niyōgayōgandharaṁ yabhinava
nava cāṇākyaṁ mahāpracaṁḍada
ṇnāyakaṁ vayidēvarasarayadhi
kāri samastaprasastisahitaṁ
śrīmatu vaijarasadaṁḍanāyaka
ru taṁbadāṟuṁbāḍavanā
ḷuttiralu taṁbada śrīboppēsvaradē
vara jīrṇnōddhārakke yā dēva
ra kaiyyaruvaṇava Eṁṭu hi
ṭṭu stānamānya prabhu mukhyavā
gi © Ā stānadayācāryya
caṁdarāsi sāṁtarāsi guruga
ḷige dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi
māṇikēsvarada mattaru 150
tōṁṭa hiriyakōla mattaru 1 dēvariṁ
baḍagalu 150 keyya nīḷa yippa
ttu kaiyya Agalada nivēsa
na yiṁntinisuṭuvaṁ sarvvanama
syavāgi biṭṭa datti da hē
ṟiṁge mā(ṁ)navata .

yeleya hēṟiṁge
yele 25 . hoṁge
haṁneraḍu A
ḍake yeṁṇne
gāṇake
dēvarige voṁ
ṭu dēvariṁ
teṁkalu maṭha ©
svadartthaṁ nadhikaṁ pu
ṁṇyaṁ parada
ttānupālanaṁ
paradattāpahārēṇa
svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavē
tu © svadattaṁ pa
radatta va yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharā ṣa
ṣṭhivaruṣsa saha
srāya miṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē
krimiyīdharmmavanu
Āvanāno [A*]yaṣamaṁ
bagedaḍe vāraṇāsiyo
ḷagaṁ basiṟu

na haḷḷiya dāri mū
ṁ mūḍalu haṇitageṟeyiṁ te
ṁkalu bāḷiṁ paḍuvalu
na sā liṁ baḍagalu śrīma
tu boppēsvaradēvarige salu
taṁdaḷeva ha
ḷi teru 60 dharaṁ paḍisi
pū karaṇika
mma tuppa 1 Aḍake 1 Etti
sōmavāra
worn out
maṁgaḷa
mahā śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.197 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
